---
title: "Home"
about: 
  template: jolla

title-block-banner: "#00000000"
title-block-banner-color: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)"
format:
  html:
    css: [style.css, hero.css]
    template-partials:
      - title-block.html # Use the custom title block partial
    toc: false
listing:
  - id: latest-post
    contents: "posts"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ejs/get_most_recent.ejs
    fields: [title, date, description]
---
**Welcome!**

I am a Research Associate at the Computational Communication Research Group, Department of Communication, Johannes Gutenberg University Mainz. My research focuses on political communication across social media platforms, employing advanced quantitative methods with an emphasis on machine learning techniques and large language models (LLMs).

This website serves as a central place for my academic, professional, and personal activities. If you want to know more about me, head over to the [about page](about.qmd).

---


::: {.grid .custom-grid}
<!-- Using a grid for featured content -->

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
### <i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> Recent Research <!-- Using Bootstrap icons -->

You can find details on my current work and other research here:

[<i class="bi bi-arrow-right-short"></i> View Publications](research.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::


::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
### <i class="bi bi-display"></i> Featured Project

I'm currently working on **obsidianchatR**, a way to chat with my obsidian notes.

[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Project Repository](https://github.com/yannickwinkler/obsidianchatR){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
### <i class="bi bi-easel2"></i> Current Teaching

This Sommersemester, I am teaching **Datenanalyse mit R**. The course is designed as an inverted classroom. The course website can be found [here](https://stats.ifp.uni-mainz.de/ba-datenanalyse/).

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
### <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i> Blog

Check out my latest thoughts and updates:

::: {#latest-post}
:::

:::

:::

<!-- ::: -->
